changes.reason: Distinct high-value symptom cluster: cellular data is enabled but webpages or apps cannot connect; neighboring canonical articles cover Wi-Fi, personal hotspot, and SOS/no-service states.

canonicalReview.notes: Matched articles cover Wi-Fi association, sharing the iPhone connection, or total cellular registration states. This proposal is limited to cellular-data access after separating those neighboring intents, including per-app permission and dual-SIM data-line selection.
